![Fedora 43 Ready](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fedora-43-ready?style=for-the-badge&logo=fedora&logoColor=33CCFF&labelColor=1F1F1F&color=33CCFF) ![Fedora 44 Ready](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fedora-44-ready?style=for-the-badge&logo=fedora&logoColor=33CCFF&labelColor=1F1F1F&color=33CCFF) ![Fedora rawhide Ready](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fedora-rawhide-ready?style=for-the-badge&logo=fedora&logoColor=33CCFF&labelColor=1F1F1F&color=33CCFF)

![x86_64](https://img.shields.io/badge/arch-x86__64-supported?style=for-the-badge&logo=linux&logoColor=eceff4&labelColor=1F1F1F&color=a3be8c) ![aarch64](https://img.shields.io/badge/arch-aarch64-supported?style=for-the-badge&logo=arm&logoColor=eceff4&labelColor=1F1F1F&color=ebcb8b)

This repo provides automations for managing COPR repo `nett00n/hyprland`

`nett00n/hyprland` COPR repo provides both official and non-official
but useful packages to running Hyprland on your Fedora system

[üìé Officially recommended](https://wiki.hypr.land/Getting-Started/Installation/#packages) repo `solopasha/hyprland` ([üìé Git](https://github.com/solopasha/hyprlandRPM/tree/master), [üìé solopasha/hyprland COPR](https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/solopasha/hyprland/)) seems to be abandoned: it has no commits in last 4+ month now

This repository is created with reproduced builds and future support convenience in mind

Feel free to reuse automation from this repository for your own copr-projects

- [üìé Check my hyprland repo on COPR](https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/nett00n/hyprland/)
- [üìé Check my hyprland repo on GitHub](https://Github.com/nett00n/hyprland-copr/)


## News

### Not great not terrible

> **Packages info**
>
> Nothing important since the last one. I had troubles with ARM-build, details in automation section
>
> **Automation info**
>
> `release` a thing now, and shows real counter of builds for current version of package. The most ofthen cause of rebuild would be the dependency version update.
> Recently all packages were build as 1.2.3-1, where "1.2.3" - was a version and "1" was a static %autorelease. But this was breaking a depedency find process. I could just replace 1 in packages.yaml, but humans are making mistakes, so full-cycle autoicrement release, while building a package.
>
> Replaced all YAML writes with ruamel lib for simplifying code and unifying
>
> Pet your pets, sincerely yours nett00n
>
> 2026-04-24


[üìù More posts on GitHub](https://github.com/nett00n/hyprland-copr/tree/main/blog)

## Packages


### Hyprland new user starter-pack

- `hypridle` ‚Äî An idle management daemon for Hyprland
- `hyprland` ‚Äî A Modern C++ Wayland Compositor
- `hyprland-guiutils` ‚Äî Hyprland GUI utilities
- `hyprlock` ‚Äî A gpu-accelerated screen lock for Hyprland
- `hyprpaper` ‚Äî A blazing fast Wayland wallpaper utility
- `hyprshot` ‚Äî Utility to easily take screenshots in Hyprland using your mouse
- `swaync` ‚Äî A simple GTK based notification daemon for any Wayland compositor
- `waybar` ‚Äî Highly customizable Wayland bar for Sway and Wlroots based compositors
- `wofi` ‚Äî Wofi is a launcher/menu program for wlroots based wayland compositors such as sway

### Hyprland main packages

![Hyprland](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hyprland-33CCFF?logo=hyprland&logoColor=black&style=for-the-badge)

- `hypridle` ‚Äî An idle management daemon for Hyprland
- `hyprland` ‚Äî A Modern C++ Wayland Compositor
- `hyprland-git` ‚Äî A Modern C++ Wayland Compositor [Built from latest commit, unstable]
- `hyprland-guiutils` ‚Äî Hyprland GUI utilities
- `hyprland-plugins` ‚Äî Official plugins for Hyprland
- `hyprland-plugins-git` ‚Äî Official plugins for Hyprland [Built from latest commit, unstable]
- `hyprland-qt-support` ‚Äî A qml style provider for hypr* qt apps
- `hyprlauncher` ‚Äî A multipurpose and versatile launcher / picker for Hyprland
- `hyprlock` ‚Äî A gpu-accelerated screen lock for Hyprland
- `hyprpaper` ‚Äî A blazing fast Wayland wallpaper utility
- `hyprpicker` ‚Äî A wlroots-compatible Wayland color picker that does not suck
- `hyprpolkitagent` ‚Äî A polkit authentication agent written in QT/QML
- `hyprpwcenter` ‚Äî Volume management center for Hyprland
- `hyprqt6engine` ‚Äî QT6 Theme Provider for Hyprland
- `hyprshot` ‚Äî Utility to easily take screenshots in Hyprland using your mouse
- `hyprshutdown` ‚Äî A graceful shutdown utility for Hyprland
- `hyprsunset` ‚Äî An application to enable a blue-light filter on Hyprland
- `hyprsysteminfo` ‚Äî System info utility for Hyprland
- `xdg-desktop-portal-hyprland` ‚Äî An XDG-Destop-Portal backend for Hyprland (and wlroots)

### Hyprland dependencies

![Hyprland](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hyprland-33CCFF?logo=hyprland&logoColor=black&style=for-the-badge)

- `aquamarine` ‚Äî A very light linux rendering backend library
- `hyprcursor` ‚Äî A library and toolkit for the Hyprland cursor format
- `hyprgraphics` ‚Äî Small C++ library for graphics utilities across the Hypr ecosystem
- `hyprland-protocols` ‚Äî Wayland protocol extensions for Hyprland
- `hyprland-qt-support` ‚Äî A qml style provider for hypr* qt apps
- `hyprlang` ‚Äî The hypr configuration language library
- `hyprtoolkit` ‚Äî A modern C++ Wayland-native GUI toolkit
- `hyprutils` ‚Äî Small C++ library for utilities used across the Hypr ecosystem
- `hyprwayland-scanner` ‚Äî A Wayland scanner replacement for Hypr projects
- `hyprwire` ‚Äî A fast and consistent wire protocol for IPC

### Useful apps

- `bemenu` ‚Äî Dynamic menu library and client program inspired by dmenu
- `cliphist` ‚Äî Wayland clipboard manager with support for multimedia
- `clipman` ‚Äî A simple clipboard manager for Wayland
- `copyq` ‚Äî CopyQ is an advanced clipboard manager with powerful editing and scripting features.
- `eww` ‚Äî Elkowars Wacky Widgets is a standalone widget system made in Rust that allows you to implement your own, custom widgets in any window manager
- `fuzzel` ‚Äî App launcher and fuzzy finder for Wayland, inspired by rofi and dmenu
- `gammastep` ‚Äî Adjust the color temperature of your screen according to your surroundings. This may help your eyes hurt less if you are working in front of the screen at night.
- `hyprland-per-window-layout` ‚Äî Per-window keyboard layout daemon for Hyprland
- `network-manager-applet` ‚Äî Tray applet and an advanced network connection editor
- `nnn` ‚Äî n¬≥ The unorthodox terminal file manager
- `pyprland` ‚Äî Scratchpads & many goodies for Hyprland
- `quickshell` ‚Äî Flexible QtQuick based desktop shell toolkit
- `ranger` ‚Äî A VIM-inspired filemanager for the console
- `swaybg` ‚Äî Great utility if all you want is one simple static wallpaper
- `udiskie` ‚Äî udiskie is a udisks2 front-end that allows to manage removable media such as CDs or flash drives for userspace
- `uwsm` ‚Äî Universal Wayland Session Manager
- `waybar` ‚Äî Highly customizable Wayland bar for Sway and Wlroots based compositors
- `waybar-git` ‚Äî Highly customizable Wayland bar for Sway and Wlroots based compositors [Built from latest commit, unstable]

### Other dependencies

- `aylurs-gtk-shell` ‚Äî Scaffolding CLI for Astal+Gnim
- `cava` ‚Äî Cross-platform Audio Visualizer
- `cpptrace` ‚Äî Simple, portable, and self-contained stacktrace library for C++11 and newer
- `glaze` ‚Äî Extremely fast, in memory, JSON and reflection library for modern C++.
- `gtk4-layer-shell` ‚Äî A library to create panels and other desktop components for Wayland using the Layer Shell protocol and GTK4
- `libdwarf-code` ‚Äî Library to access DWARF debugging information
- `sndio` ‚Äî Portable version of OpenBSD's lightweight audio & MIDI sub-system
> *\** - not provided by this repo, exists in fedora's
